query: What AI practices are prohibited under the EU AI Act?
notes: Prohibited practices: facial recognition scraping (p12), subliminal distortion (p9), general prohibitions chapter (p44, p45). p51 is AI literacy — not relevant.

query: How does the EU AI Act define high-risk AI systems?
notes: Annex III lists high-risk categories (p127). Article 6 classification rules (p53). Risk factors for outcomes (p55). p14 covers related regulations — somewhat relevant.

query: What transparency obligations apply to AI systems under EU law?
notes: HLEG transparency requirement section (p20). EU AI Act transparency obligations for high-risk systems (p82). Recital on opacity concerns (p21). Cross-document query.

query: What are the key principles of trustworthy AI?
notes: Podcast-only query. Operationalizing trustworthy AI (c1), fundamental rights (c2), human autonomy (c8), environmental well-being (c6) are highly relevant. c0 is intro — somewhat relevant.

query: How should AI systems handle fundamental rights in the EU?
notes: HLEG section 2.1 Fundamental rights as basis for Trustworthy AI (p12). Citizens rights and AI (p13). EU Charter context (p11). Baseline retrieves all from HLEG EN — well-matched query.

query: What conformity assessment procedures are required for high-risk AI?
notes: Article 43 Conformity assessment (p78). Annex VI conformity procedure based on internal control (p133). Notified bodies (p80). New Legislative Framework context (p32) — somewhat relevant.
